title: Wawa - Upper Moreland, PA - PH&C
excerpt: Key Features: 5,585sf Wawa Food Market with 12 fuel stations 10,000sf Mixed Use Retail Building Grubb Burger Restaurant, Sports Clips, Zoe’s Kitchen, Royal Bank SEPTA Station Pedestrian Improvements Stream Bank Repair / Riparian Buffer Restoration Stream Road Crossing PennDOT & Township Signal & Access Improvements Individual NPDES Permit
contentHtml:
Key Features:

  • 5,585sf Wawa Food Market with 12 fuel stations
  • 10,000sf Mixed Use Retail Building
  • Grubb Burger Restaurant, Sports Clips, Zoe’s Kitchen, Royal Bank
  • SEPTA Station Pedestrian Improvements
  • Stream Bank Repair / Riparian Buffer Restoration
  • Stream Road Crossing
  • PennDOT & Township Signal & Access Improvements
  • Individual NPDES Permit
